title: The Old Witch
description: Deep within the forest, an old witch stirs a bubbling cauldron. Without looking up, she smiles and says, "I've been expecting you." She offers knowledge, but every gift has a price.

options.title: Accept Her Bargain
options.description: Knowledge is worth any price... isn't it?

options.title: Steal Her Spellbook
options.description: If knowledge has a price, perhaps it's cheaper to simply take it.

options.title: Walk Away
options.description: Some doors are better left unopened.
